# @dashlab/core

Headless React dashboard library. Build interactive dashboards with drag-and-drop layout, resizable widgets, KPI cards, and charts.

## Install
npm install @dashlab/core

## Core API

### Dashboard (root component)
Props: id, persist (storage key), storage ("localStorage"|"sessionStorage"), defaultEdit, onLayoutChange, children

### DashboardCard (widget wrapper)
Props: id, drag (boolean), resize (boolean), settings (boolean|ReactNode), delete (boolean), responsive (boolean), title, children, onDelete, onSettingsChange, onDragEnd

### KPIWidget
Props: id, title, value (number), format ("number"|"currency"|"percent"), previousValue, trend, prefix, suffix

### RechartsWidget
Props: id, chartType ("bar"|"line"|"area"|"pie"|"scatter"|"radar"|"radialBar"), data, series, xAxisKey, title, height

### NivoWidget
Props: id, chartType ("heatmap"|"treemap"|"sunburst"), data, title, colorScheme, height

### useDashboard (hook)
Returns: { isEditMode, toggleEditMode, setEditMode, widgets, addWidget, removeWidget, updateWidgetPosition, updateWidgetSize, updateWidgetSettings, saveLayout, loadLayout, resetLayout }

### useDashboardStore (Zustand store)
Direct Zustand store access for custom integrations.

## Quick start example
```tsx
import { Dashboard, DashboardCard } from '@dashlab/core'
import { KPIWidget, RechartsWidget } from '@dashlab/core'
import '@dashlab/core/styles.css'

function SalesDashboard() {
  return (
    <Dashboard id="sales" persist="sales-v1">
      <DashboardCard id="revenue" drag resize>
        <KPIWidget id="rev-kpi" title="Revenue" value={124500} format="currency" previousValue={98000} />
      </DashboardCard>
      <DashboardCard id="chart" drag resize settings>
        <RechartsWidget id="sales-chart" chartType="bar" title="Monthly Sales"
          data={[{name:'Jan',value:4000},{name:'Feb',value:3000}]}
          series={[{key:'value',name:'Sales',color:'#6366f1'}]}
          xAxisKey="name" />
      </DashboardCard>
    </Dashboard>
  )
}
```
